hero.title: Quick Notepad
hero.description: Capture notes quickly with auto-save keeping your latest writing protected.

differences.title: A direct place to capture what matters
differences.description: Quick Notepad keeps note-taking simple while auto-save protects ongoing writing.

items.title: Immediate writing
items.description: Start capturing a thought without a long setup flow.

items.title: Automatic saving
items.description: Keep the latest note changes saved as you write.

items.title: Focused workspace
items.description: Keep attention on the note currently being written.

feel.title: Ready when a thought arrives
feel.description: The experience reduces the distance between having an idea and writing it down.

items.title: Open the notepad
items.description: Get to a writing space quickly.

items.title: Capture the thought
items.description: Write the information while it is fresh.

items.title: Keep moving
items.description: Rely on auto-save while continuing the note.

audiences.title: Who uses Quick Notepad
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who needs a simple place to write something down.

items.title: Students
items.description: Capture quick study notes and ideas.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Write down meeting points and working thoughts.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Keep temporary notes and useful details in one focused space.

resourceSection.title: Note-taking essentials

items.title: Writing space

items.title: Quick capture
items.description: Record information as soon as it matters.

groupedSection.title: A simple note workflow

items.name: Idea

technicalSection.title: Built for quick note capture
